headline: Berkshire Hathaway Shifts To Greg Abel As CEO With Renewed Buybacks
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.A) has confirmed Greg Abel as CEO, with Warren Buffett remaining as chairman. The company has restarted share buybacks after nearly two years without repurchases. Greg Abel has said he will use his entire after tax salary each year to buy Berkshire Hathaway stock. Berkshire Hathaway, now led by CEO Greg Abel with Warren Buffett staying on as chairman, is entering a new chapter while keeping its core structure intact.
